account_email_locked_hint: Your email address is your sign-in and can't be changed.
account_passkeys_description: With a passkey you sign in right away with Face ID, Touch ID or a security key — without waiting for an email. Add one passkey per device you use.
account_passkeys_empty_description: Add a passkey to sign in faster next time.
account_profile_description: Update your name and phone number.
avatar_error_too_large: The image is too large (max 5 MB)
avatar_error_unsupported_format: Only JPG, PNG, WebP, AVIF or HEIC
avatar_format_hint: JPG, PNG, WebP, AVIF or HEIC. Max 5 MB.
cmd_kw_account: account settings profile passkeys sign in
dashboard_empty_description: This is your starting point — pages you add will show up here.
email_invite_body: Hi! You've been invited to Oceanview. Click the button below to get started. The link is valid for 7 days.
email_invite_fallback: If the button doesn't work, copy and paste the following link into your browser:
email_invite_ignore: If you weren't expecting this invitation, you can ignore this email.
email_invite_preview: You've been invited to Oceanview. Accept to get started.
email_magiclink_body: Hi! Click the button below to sign in. The link is valid for 5 minutes.
email_magiclink_fallback: If the button doesn't work, copy and paste the following link into your browser:
email_magiclink_ignore: If you didn't request this email, you can safely ignore it.
email_magiclink_preview: Use the link to sign in. Valid for 5 minutes.
file_error_not_in_storage: The file wasn't found in storage
image_error_not_yours: The profile picture doesn't belong to you
login_description: Sign in with a passkey or a link to your email.
login_sent_description: The sign-in link is on its way.
login_sent_instructions: Check your inbox (or the server log for now) and follow the link to continue.
login_sent_to: We've sent a sign-in link to
login_signed_in_body: You can close this tab and go back to your other tab — or continue here.
login_switch_user: Sign in as a different user
login_unknown_email_error: No account exists for this email address. Contact an administrator to be added.
meta_account_description: Manage your account and your passkeys
meta_root_description: Internal tool for Oceanview's boat owners.
notfound_body: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.
onboarding_avatar_description: A picture makes it easier for the others to recognize you. Optional.
onboarding_name_description: Your name is shown in the contact list for the other owners.
onboarding_phone_description: So the other owners can reach you easily. Optional.
passkey_added: Passkey added. Next time you'll sign in right away.
passkey_delete_description: You'll no longer be able to sign in with this passkey on the device where it was created. You can always add a new one.
passkey_not_fresh_description: For security, you need to have signed in recently. You can add a passkey later from your account.
passkey_not_fresh_title: Can't add a passkey right now
passkey_reauth_not_fresh_hint: Not confirmed yet — open the link we sent first.
passkey_reauth_prompt_prefix: For security reasons you need to sign in again before adding a passkey. We'll send a sign-in link to
passkey_reauth_sent_suffix: Open it (check your inbox, or the server log for now), come back here and press Add passkey.
passkey_setup_description: Create a passkey and you'll sign in right away with Face ID, Touch ID or a security key next time — without waiting for an email.
user_delete_confirm: {name} will no longer be able to sign in. The user is kept in the history.
user_error_already_accepted: The user has already accepted the invitation
user_error_email_taken: A user with this email address already exists
user_error_last_admin: There must be at least one administrator
user_error_target_deleted: The user is deleted and can't be changed
user_field_email_locked_hint: The email address is the sign-in identity and can't be changed. To switch addresses, delete the user and invite them again.
user_invite_description: The user gets an email with a link to get started. They fill in their name and other details themselves.
user_restore_confirm: The user will be able to sign in again via magic link.
user_restore_confirm_named: {name} will be able to sign in again via magic link.
validation_name_too_long: The name is too long (max 255 characters)
validation_phone_too_long: The phone number is too long (max 30 characters)
validation_phone_too_short: The phone number is too short (min 5 characters)
